# Add Dashboard and Analytics

Create a dashboard exposing aggregated counts and quick metrics (active centers, groups, instructors, students).

## Tasks

- Implement backend aggregations (counts, recent signups, capacity utilization).
- Create dashboard UI with summary boxes and charts.
- Add endpoints/GraphQL queries for dashboard data with auth protection.

## Rationale

Dashboard helps admins monitor system health and adoption at a glance.

Suggested labels: enhancement, analytics
